titleStmt.title: SII 4.678: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 678. (A.R. No. 228 of 1892).See Ep. Ind., Vol. VI, p. 278, No. 13. ON A THIRD PILLAR IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
¿ svasti . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāmaṁḍalēśvara
vīramahēśvara kulōttuṁgacōḍadēvadivyaśrīpādā
rādhaka parabalasādhaka durjjayakulācalamrigē
ṁdra satyahariścaṁdra pratijñāparaśurāma Aniyaṁka
bhīma satyarādhēya śaucāṁjanēya Eladāyasiṁha vi
kramanṛsiṁha sujanajanavanavasaṁta kāṁtājayaṁta vi
vēkapadmāsana giripaścimaśāsana vitaraṇavi
nōda kastūrikāmōda hayavatsarāja rājamanō
janāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁbuna śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara koṁḍapaḍmaṭi buddarāju ¿ śakavarṣaṁbulu
1070 Agunēṁṭi viṣusaṁkrāṁtinimittamuna nādiṁḍlaśrīmūla
sthānamahādēvara kakhaṁḍavartti dīpaṁbuna kiccina goṟiyalu 55 [. *] vīni
ṁ jēkoni caṁdabōyuni koḍuku paḍle dana putrānupautraka mācaṁdrārkkamu
nitya māneṁḍu neyi yī dīpaṁbunakuṁ bōyaṁ galavāṁḍu . Ī dēvaraku maṟi
yu nokkadīpaṁbuna kiccina goṟiyalu 55 . vīniṁ jēkoni Ayyanabō
yuni koḍuku dāme dana putrānupautraka mācaṁdrārkkamu nitya māneṁḍu
neyi yī dīpaṁbunakuṁ bōyaṁgalavāṁḍu .
Digital edition of SII 4.678 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
